---
title: "P1. Screening of bioactive components from Qifu Decoction"
date: "2025-11-21"
format: 
  wordcount-html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
---

---

# LC-MS-Based Serum Pharmacochemical Profiling

## Tan2012

- **标题**：Detection and identification of diterpenoid alkaloids, isoflavonoids and saponins in Qifu decoction and rat plasma by liquid chromatography-time-of-flight mass spectrometry [@tan2012qfda]

- **PubMed ID**：21594877 

- **期刊**：Biomedical Chromatography（BMC） 

- **核心数据**：

  - 采用LC-TOF-MS技术首次系统表征芪附汤体外及体内入血成分；
  
  - 体外水煎液共鉴定**44种化学成分**，包含21种附子二萜生物碱、12种黄芪异黄酮、11种黄芪三萜皂苷；
  
  - 大鼠口服给药后血浆中鉴定出**22种入血原型成分**，未检出体内代谢产物；
  
  - 证实黄芪与附子共煎可改变生物碱溶出比例，为复方配伍物质基础提供早期实验依据。
  
- **核心价值**：业内首篇系统阐明芪附汤“体外成分-体内入血原型”对应关系的SCI文献，奠定芪附汤血清药物化学研究范式，可为本次研究体外成分库构建、入血原型成分初筛提供权威溯源依据，解决传统网络药理学仅用数据库预测、无体内实验支撑的短板。

- **用途**：体外成分基线数据、早期入血原型成分佐证、配伍溶出规律依据。

::: {#tab-tan2012-invitro}
Compound.English	Compound.Chinese	Source	Chemical_Category	In_vitro_Detection	In_vivo_Blood_Absorption
Aconitine	乌头碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diester-type alkaloid (highly toxic)	Detected	Undetectable
Mesaconitine	中乌头碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diester-type alkaloid (highly toxic)	Detected	Undetectable
Hypaconitine	次乌头碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diester-type alkaloid (highly toxic)	Detected	Undetectable
Benzoylmesaconine	苯甲酰中乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Monoester-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Benzoylhypaconine	苯甲酰次乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Monoester-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Aconine	乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Hypaconine	次乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Neoline	尼奥林	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Talatizamine	塔拉乌头胺	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Chasmanine	查斯曼宁	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
14-Acetyltalatizamine	14 - 乙酰塔拉胺	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Mesaconine	新乌宁碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Detectable
Fuziline	附子灵	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Salsolinol	萨尔索林	Aconitum carmichaelii	Minor alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Deoxyaconitine	脱氧乌头碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diester-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
3-Deoxyaconine	3 - 脱氧乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Methylhypaconine	甲基次乌头原碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Methylmesaconine	甲基新乌宁碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Isotalatizamine	异塔拉乌头胺	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Vilmorrianine	维乌头胺	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Karacoline	卡拉可林	Aconitum carmichaelii	Amine-type alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Songorine	松果灵	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diterpenoid alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Hetisine	异替辛	Aconitum carmichaelii	Diterpenoid alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Spicatine	穗乌头碱	Aconitum carmichaelii	Minor alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Bullatine A	雪上一枝蒿甲素	Aconitum carmichaelii	Minor alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Bullatine B	雪上一枝蒿乙素	Aconitum carmichaelii	Minor alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Other minor Aconitum alkaloids (6 species)	附子微量生物碱（6 种）	Aconitum carmichaelii	Minor alkaloid	Detected	Undetectable
Calycosin-7-glucoside	毛蕊异黄酮 - 7 - 葡萄糖苷	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid glycoside	Detected	Detectable
Ononin	芒柄花苷	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid glycoside	Detected	Detectable
Calycosin	毛蕊异黄酮	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Detectable
Formononetin	芒柄花素	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Detectable
Kaempferol	山奈酚	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Undetectable
Quercetin	槲皮素	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Undetectable
Rutin	芦丁	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid glycoside	Detected	Undetectable
Isorhamnetin	异鼠李素	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Undetectable
Other minor Astragalus flavonoids (4 species)	黄芪微量黄酮（4 种）	Astragalus membranaceus	Flavonoid	Detected	Undetectable
Astragaloside IV	黄芪甲苷 IV	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Detectable
Astragaloside II	黄芪甲苷 II	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Undetectable
Astragaloside III	黄芪甲苷 III	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Undetectable
Isoastragaloside I	异黄芪皂苷 I	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Undetectable
Isoastragaloside II	异黄芪皂苷 II	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Undetectable
Other minor Astragalus saponins (6 species)	黄芪微量皂苷（6 种）	Astragalus membranaceus	Triterpenoid saponin	Detected	Undetectable

**Table S1.** Chemical components of Qifu Decoction in aqueous extract (in vitro) identified by Tan 2012 (PMID:21594877).
*Note: All data were experimentally determined via HPLC-ESI-MS. Highly toxic diester-type alkaloids were only detected in aqueous extract but undetectable in rat serum.*
:::

::: {#tab-tan2012-invivo}
| Compound.English              | Compound.Chinese      | Source                     | Chemical_Category          |
|-------------------------------|-----------------------|----------------------------|----------------------------|
| Calycosin-7-glucoside         | 毛蕊异黄酮-7-葡萄糖苷 | Astragalus membranaceus    | Flavonoid glycoside        |
| Ononin                        | 芒柄花苷              | Astragalus membranaceus    | Flavonoid glycoside        |
| Calycosin                     | 毛蕊异黄酮            | Astragalus membranaceus    | Flavonoid                  |
| Formononetin                  | 芒柄花素              | Astragalus membranaceus    | Flavonoid                  |
| Astragaloside IV              | 黄芪甲苷IV            | Astragalus membranaceus    | Triterpenoid saponin       |
| Benzoylmesaconine             | 苯甲酰中乌头原碱      | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Monoester-type alkaloid    |
| Benzoylhypaconine             | 苯甲酰次乌头原碱      | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Monoester-type alkaloid    |
| Aconine                       | 乌头原碱              | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| Hypaconine                    | 次乌头原碱            | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| Neoline                       | 尼奥林                | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| Talatizamine                  | 塔拉乌头胺            | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| Chasmanine                    | 查斯曼宁              | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| 14-Acetyltalatizamine         | 14-乙酰塔拉胺         | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |
| Mesaconine                    | 新乌宁碱              | Aconitum carmichaelii      | Amine-type alkaloid        |

**Table S2.** Validated blood-absorbed prototype components of Qifu Decoction identified by serum pharmacochemistry (Tan 2012, PMID:21594877).
*Note: No in vivo metabolites were identified in this study. These 14 blood-absorbed prototypes were regarded as the fundamental bioactive substances of Qifu Decoction in vivo.*
:::


## Zhang2024
- **标题**：Multiple-matrices metabolomics combined with serum pharmacochemistry for discovering the potential targets and active constituents of Qifu decoction against heart failure 
- **PubMed ID**：38522367 
- **期刊**：Journal of Pharmaceutical and Biomedical Analysis（JPBA，SCI二区） 
- **核心数据**：
  - 依托UHPLC-Q-TOF-MS血清药物化学+多基质代谢组学研究，明确芪附汤体外水煎液含**41种化学成分**（附子27种、黄芪14种）；
  - 大鼠口服后血清中共检出**24种入血有效成分**，包含14种原型成分、10种体内Ⅰ/Ⅱ相代谢产物；
  - 筛选得到尼奥林、毛蕊异黄酮2种核心药效成分，结合细胞实验证实二者可靶向调控心肌损伤通路，发挥抗心力衰竭作用。
- **核心价值**：目前芪附汤抗心衰物质基础最新、最完整的质谱实验研究，首次完整建立“体外成分-入血原型-体内代谢物”三维物质库，同时完成成分药效验证，可直接作为本研究**真实活性成分筛选的唯一金标准数据集**，彻底规避纯数据库筛选的假阳性问题。 
- **用途**：本研究**核心数据金标准**，最终入血成分筛选唯一核心依据。






# Reference {-}
